keyEvents.text: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Netherlands 0, Japan 0.
Second Half begins Netherlands 0, Japan 0.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Japan 0. Virgil van Dijk (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ryan Gravenberch with a cross following a set piece situation.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Japan 1. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Takefusa Kubo.
Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Japan 1. Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ryan Gravenberch.
Substitution, Japan. Junya Ito replaces Daizen Maeda.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Netherlands. Memphis Depay replaces Donyell Malen.
Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Crysencio Summerville.
Substitution, Netherlands. Quinten Timber replaces Tijjani Reijnders.
Delay in match because of an injury Takefusa Kubo (Japan).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.
Substitution, Japan. Takehiro Tomiyasu replaces Tsuyoshi Watanabe.
Substitution, Japan. Koki Ogawa replaces Takefusa Kubo because of an injury.
Substitution, Netherlands. Nathan Aké replaces Ryan Gravenberch.
Memphis Depay (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Japan. Kento Shiogai replaces Ayase Ueda.
Substitution, Netherlands. Brian Brobbey replaces Cody Gakpo.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Japan 2. Daichi Kamada (Japan) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Koki Ogawa following a corner.
Delay in match (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
keyEvents.shortText: Micky van de Ven Yellow Card
